transitions.name: trigger_build
transitions.description: Trigger the build on TeamCity for environment deployment.
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment build is currently in progress.

process.name: trigger_build_process
process.description: Process to trigger build in TeamCity.

transitions.name: deployment_complete
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment build is currently in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment has been completed successfully.

process.name: complete_deployment_process
process.description: Process to mark deployment as complete.

transitions.name: deployment_failed
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment build is currently in progress.

transitions.name: trigger_user_app_build
transitions.description: Trigger the build for the user application on TeamCity.
transitions.start_state_description: The user app build is pending.
transitions.end_state_description: The user app build is currently in progress.

process.name: trigger_user_app_build_process
process.description: Process to trigger user app build.

transitions.name: user_app_deployment_complete
transitions.description: Complete the user app deployment once finished.
transitions.start_state_description: The user app build is currently in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The user app deployment has been completed successfully.

process.name: complete_user_app_deployment_process
process.description: Process to mark user app deployment as complete.

transitions.name: user_app_deployment_failed
transitions.start_state_description: The user app build is currently in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The user app deployment has failed.

process.name: handle_user_app_failure_process
process.description: Process to handle user app deployment failure.
